calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Nov-25-2025 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jun-17-2025 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Oct-29-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

This matter was set for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated Jun-28-2022 is admitted to probate. Nancy Genatt is appointed Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is set at $20,000. Frank Mahoney III is appointed probate Referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Nov-25-2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is two weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Lydia Villarreal. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Wong. Not Reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Sep-17-2024 Continued To Oct-29-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
